title: spergula marginata var. munbyana
intro: Spergula marginata var. munbyana, also known as Munby's spurry or Lesser spurry, is a plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Munby's spurry include its potential to treat urinary tract issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Munby's spurry is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its dried roots and leaves are used in herbal remedies.
